title: Fishing Real: Collector's Reap
description: Collector's Reap Compatibility with Fishing Real
body:
![Purpura Skies: Shielded Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4d5f7553de15f047beca7d1fe653c26fd0b108.png)
Originally made for an upcoming modpack, Shielded. I figured it would be helpful for others too. This datapack adds compatibility between [Collector's Reap](https://modrinth.com/mod/collectors-reap) by brnbrd and [Fishing Real](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-real) by PricelessKoala. It makes it so that when you fish up collector's reaps fish/items, real entities will spawn. This is meant to be used with a global datapacks mod like [this one](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)!
